allow: Bash(python -c " import sys,json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'data' in data: for item in data['data']: name = item.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) if 'coffee' in name or 'robusta' in name: print\(item\) ")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; print\(json.dumps\(json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\), indent=2\)[:400]\)" echo "===" curl -sk -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" "https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/RM%3DF?range=5d&interval=1d")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; print\(json.dumps\(json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\), indent=2\)[:400]\)" echo "===" curl -sk -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" "https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/KC%3DF?range=5d&interval=1d")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); r=d.get\('chart',{}\).get\('result'\); print\('KC=F found:', bool\(r\)\); print\(r[0]['meta']['symbol'] if r else d['chart'].get\('error'\)\)")

Bash(python -c " import sys,json data = json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\) for item in data: name = item.get\('Name',''\).lower\(\) if 'coffee' in name or 'robusta' in name: print\(item.get\('Symbol'\), '-', item.get\('Name'\), '-', item.get\('Last'\), '-', item.get\('Unit'\)\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys,json data = json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\) if isinstance\(data, list\) and len\(data\) > 1: for item in data[1]: name = item.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) if 'coffee' in name or 'robusta' in name: print\(item.get\('id'\), '-', item.get\('name'\), '-', item.get\('sourceNote',''\)[:100]\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys,json raw = sys.stdin.read\(\) data = json.loads\(raw\) if isinstance\(data, list\) and len\(data\) > 1: for item in data[1]: val = item.get\('value',''\).lower\(\) if isinstance\(item.get\('value'\), str\) else str\(item\) sid = item.get\('id',''\).lower\(\) if 'coffee' in val or 'coffee' in sid or 'robusta' in val or 'robusta' in sid: print\(item\) print\('Total series:', len\(data[1]\)\) else: print\(raw[:400]\) ")
